title: Pentameris porosa
taxonomy: Pentameris porosa is classified under the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. This classification is based on its characteristics and morphological features. Pentameris porosa is further grouped under the subfamily Pooideae, which is a large and diverse group of grasses. The genus Pentameris is often considered a synonym for the genus Avenula, although some sources may still recognize it as a distinct genus. Pentameris porosa is native to Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
